title: Preparation of Chemically Competent Cells
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pnhmme

steps.title: Transfer 1 mL of overnight culture...
steps.instruction: Transfer 1 mL of overnight culture into 50 mL LB in a flask Preparation of LB Media by NUS iGEM

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C at 225...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C at 225 rpm until OD600 = 0.6

steps.title: Transfer culture to 50 mL falcon tube
steps.instruction: Transfer culture to 50 mL falcon tube

steps.title: Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 30 mL of 0
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 30 mL of 0.1 Molarity (M) magnesium chloride solution Preparation of Chemicals by NUS iGEM

steps.title: Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 20 mL of 0
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 20 mL of 0.1 Molarity (M) calcium chloride solution Preparation of Chemicals by NUS iGEM

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 1.5 mL of cold mixture comprising 20% glycerol and 80% 0.1 Molarity (M) calcium chloride solution

steps.title: Aliquot 60 µL of mixture into 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 60 µL of mixture into 1.5mL eppendorf tubes
